name: Jamaican Hot Wings
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds chicken wings or drumsticks, fresh not frozen
recipeInstructions:
Note: Jamaican jerk spice may be found in specialty food stores.
1. Melt the butter in a 2-quart sauce pot over low heat.
2. Add the jerk spice, Tabasco sauce, and tomato juice to the melted butter. Blend well and set aside.
3. Rinse the chicken wings under cold running water and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Dust each wing with unbleached flour.
5. Heat a heavy pot or skillet with about 2 inches of oil for frying.
6. Deep fry the wings until they are cooked through.
7. Remove the wings from the oil and place them in the sauce mixture.
8. Allow the wings to marinate in the sauce for just a few minutes.
9. Drain any excess liquid from the wings before serving.
Makes 40 - 50 wings.
